findings.location: source: 現在のトランザクションとは異なるトランザクションでSQLを実行する → 手順2
findings.description: The source mentions that SimpleDbTransactionManager can also be configured and used directly (injected) instead of obtaining it from SystemRepository: "（システムリポジトリから取得するのではなく、SimpleDbTransactionManager を設定して使用してもよい）". The knowledge file only describes the SystemRepository approach and omits this alternative injection approach.
findings.source_evidence: （システムリポジトリから取得するのではなく、:java:extdoc:`SimpleDbTransactionManager <nablarch.core.db.transaction.SimpleDbTransactionManager>` を設定して使用してもよい)

findings.description: The section's Java implementation example prominently uses SystemRepository (SystemRepository.get(...)), but 'SystemRepository' is missing from the hints array.
Both sections' Java code examples use AppDbConnection, DbConnectionContext, and SqlResultSet as prominent PascalCase classes, but none of these appear in the hints arrays for those sections.
findings.source_evidence: AppDbConnection connection = DbConnectionContext.getConnection(); ... SqlResultSet result = statement.retrieve(condition);
